description.p: HorizonXI Launcher is an unofficial, Linux-native launcher for the popular HorizonXI private server. It can download, install, update, configure, and launch the game through a native GTK interface.

The launcher also provides tools for managing game settings, logging in, launching directly into the game, managing addons, backing up macros, repairing installations, and configuring Proton-based compatibility options.
This project is an unofficial community launcher and is not affiliated with the HorizonXI team.

Initial Flathub-ready release. This version includes game installation and updates, login and launch support, addon management, community features, macro backup tools, repair options, and Proton-based compatibility management.
